visual_description: A man in a white shirt and tie stands with hands on hips, facing another person seated in front of a CRT monitor displaying a surveillance feed. The seated person, partially visible, appears to be looking at the screen. The setting is an office or control room with glass partitions and dim lighting.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a steady pace, accompanied by a slight breathiness and a sigh at the end.
